Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Handmaiden]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Handmaiden's torso is skeletally thin and mottled white, blue, and purple.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Handmaiden's head is a chaos of eyes, mouths, waving stalks, and cages of bone containing pulsing organs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Handmaiden's whistle sounds similar to the Dead Mother’s laughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — A Handmaiden of Nakothi was summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden stands head and shoulders over the tallest trees on the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden is a hideous creature that rolls on tentacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Nakothi’s Handmaiden is described as a bundle of malice and insanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Nakothi’s Handmaiden has bony hands and swarming tentacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Handmaiden is a target of cannon fire from The Testament.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — The Handmaiden is a presence that causes Syphren to go silent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Nakothi’s Handmaiden directs the Children of the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden can manipulate earth by pulling a dome of earth away from an arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden is located in a chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden is an Elder that stands at least sixty or seventy feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden has bony, double-jointed arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden is an Elder creature with a neck sixty feet high and a bed of tentacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden's torso is a vast wall of pale and desiccated skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Handmaiden's face contains a nest of writhing worms, a disemboweled corpse, a mass grave, and a plague-infested heart.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Nakothi’s Handmaiden is a servant of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Nakothi’s Handmaiden almost killed Calder and Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Shera destroyed a Handmaiden and drew its essence inside her.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Handmaiden attacked.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Handmaiden attacked the Gray Island.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
